name: OpenBuild
fullText:
300+ builders turned OpenClaw Shenzhen into absolute chaos — and it was perfect!

Noisy rooms, zero seats, code flying everywhere — this is what real AI energy feels like.  

And the real question isn’t “how do I deploy my 🦞 agent?”   
It’s: What insane thing are you going to https://t.co/WDRaDJ7N2U
